name: Anhui Huaheng Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Huaheng Biotechnology Co., Ltd. is a China-based company specializing in the research, development, production, and sales of microbial fermentation products. Their products include amino acids, organic acids, and other bio-based chemicals used in food, animal feed, and pharmaceuticals. Anhui Huaheng Biotechnology Co., Ltd. is headquartered in China.
